roles.core: central bot, finance, licenses, central report-group setup, central APIs and D1 authority
roles.edge: web panels, reseller bots, reseller report-group setup, customer miniapps and real-time event collection
roles.processor: report delivery, comprehensive aggregation, scheduled reseller automation, retry queue and background jobs

reporting.central_scope: comprehensive events and daily aggregate from every reseller bot
reporting.reseller_scope: events and daily summary only for the owning reseller bot
reporting.delivery: asynchronous processor outbox with independent central and reseller retry states

fixes: add partitioned Telegram report groups for both the central bot and every reseller bot
make the central report group comprehensive across all reseller bots with bot identity on every event
create and persist report topics without duplicating them on repeated setup or reset
send orders, payments, customers, services, trials, tickets, bot lifecycle events and errors to their matching topics
add a daily central aggregate for all bots and a separate daily summary for each reseller group
prevent duplicate central messages when reseller delivery fails and must be retried
keep reseller reports isolated so one reseller never receives another reseller's data
release channel announcement contains only version 3.0.0 changes
